acceptance.assertion: Regie renders a source-bound proposal bundle and highlights uncertainty and stale inputs.
Operators can approve, reject or defer typed operations independently.
Apply and verification results are visible and receipt-bound.
Restore is available from the same reviewed operation context.

approval.note: Repository changes require diff-bound review and green CI before merge.

goal: Provide a local interface for context, sources, instructions, semantic/visual diff, partial approval, apply, verification and restore without terminal knowledge.

post_merge_validation.result: 515 tests passed; Ruff, compileall and registry validation passed

metadata.outcome: Regie review, partial decision, apply evidence and restore context are implemented.

verified_acceptance.apply-receipt: Verified by PR #78, green CI and current post-merge validation: Apply and verification results are visible and receipt-bound.
verified_acceptance.partial-approval: Verified by PR #78, green CI and current post-merge validation: Operators can approve, reject or defer typed operations independently.
verified_acceptance.restore: Verified by PR #78, green CI and current post-merge validation: Restore is available from the same reviewed operation context.
verified_acceptance.review-bundle: Verified by PR #78, green CI and current post-merge validation: Regie renders a source-bound proposal bundle and highlights uncertainty and stale inputs.

title: SW-010 — Build Regie review interface
